title: Poppy's Create SMP
description: A (almost) lightweight create modpack focusing on create and nice visuals
body:
![Minecraft Logo Style Title reading "Poppy's Create"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3488792dccefb717307ee2d684fc52f520c5c18a.png)
I created this modpack to enjoy the new **Create: Post Production** update with my friends. I wanted something simple yet visually appealing, perfect for building cool machines and exploring without complicating things too much.

With **Create** at its core, this modpack enhances the game with beautiful visuals and small, thoughtful improvements. You can wander through gorgeous biomes thanks to **Geophilic**, relax with realistic weather from **Pretty Rain**, and admire epic views with **Distant Horizons**.

I've also included essential performance mods like **Sodium**, **Lithium**, and **ModernFix** to make gameplay smoother. Comfort mods like **Mouse Tweaks** and **AppleSkin**, along with **Xaero's Minimap** and **Xaero's World Map**, make exploring easier and more enjoyable.

Invite your friends, build amazing contraptions, and have fun exploring a laid-back SMP together!
